name: Core Strength
description: A short core circuit to build midline stability.

entries.name: Core Circuit
entries.summary: Three moves, slow and controlled. Repeat the circuit twice.

steps.title: Plank
steps.instruction: Forearms down, body in a straight line. Hold and breathe.

steps.title: Dead Bug
steps.instruction: On your back, lower opposite arm and leg slowly, then switch.

steps.title: Bird Dog
steps.instruction: On hands and knees, extend opposite arm and leg, hold, switch.
